name: gorilla-mcp
description: Find your first 100 SaaS users by searching Reddit, X, YouTube, and TikTok for real demand signals.
long_description:
Model Context Protocol server for [Gorilla](https://usegorilla.app). Paste an app idea and Gorilla returns scored leads from real posts across Reddit, YouTube, X, and TikTok where people are actively expressing demand.

## Tools

- **find_leads** — full pipeline, returns scored leads in 60-120s
- **refine_idea** — conversational refinement before searching
- **expand_themes** — generate keywords, pain points, competitors
- **search_source** — search a single platform with custom queries
- **get_run** / **list_runs** — fetch results, list past runs
- **billing_status** — check plan and remaining runs
- **draft_outreach** — platform-tuned reply for a specific lead
- **plan_acquisition_funnel** — Week-1 outreach plan from HIGH-intent leads

## Pricing

- $0.99 single run
- $3.99/week Pro (5 runs)
- $149.99 lifetime (unlimited)

Get your API key at [usegorilla.app](https://usegorilla.app).

tools.name: find_leads
tools.description: Run the full pipeline. Searches Reddit, X, YouTube, and TikTok for posts where people express demand for the given idea. Takes 60-120 seconds. Costs 1 run credit.

idea.description: The app idea or product description to find leads for

tools.name: refine_idea
tools.description: Conversational refinement. Returns one clarifying question at a time to sharpen the product description before searching. Free.

idea.description: The original raw idea text. Stays the same across turns.

current_refined_idea.description: The latest refined_idea returned by a previous refine_idea call.

history.description: Prior turns: each entry is the question the server asked and the user's answer.

language.description: Output language. 'all' (default) auto-detects from the idea text.

max_turns.description: Maximum rounds before status is forced to 'ready'. Default 5.

tools.name: expand_themes
tools.description: Generate keyword scaffolding for an idea (core keywords, adjacent niches, pain points, competitor names, exclusion terms). Costs 1 run credit.

idea.description: The app idea to expand into search themes

tools.name: search_source
tools.description: Search a single platform (reddit, x, youtube, or tiktok) with custom queries. Bypasses theme expansion and AI scoring. Costs 1 run credit.

queries.description: Search queries to run on the platform

run_id.description: Optional run ID to attach results to an existing run

tools.name: get_run
tools.description: Fetch the full result for a previously-started run by its run_id. Free.

run_id.description: The run ID returned by find_leads (e.g. 'run_abc123').

tools.name: list_runs
tools.description: List the user's recent lead-generation runs, newest first, capped at 50. Free.

tools.name: billing_status
tools.description: Check the user's plan, remaining weekly runs, and referral credits. Free.

tools.name: draft_outreach
tools.description: Generate a platform-tuned outreach message for a specific lead. Costs 1 run credit per draft.

idea.description: The refined product idea (used as the writer's voice)

source.description: Which platform the lead is on

post_body.description: Body / snippet of the lead post

post_handle.description: OP handle (e.g. 'u/founder', '@user'). Optional but improves drafts.

reply_to_author.description: For reply_comment: the author of the comment being replied to.

reply_to_text.description: For reply_comment: the comment text being replied to.

tools.name: plan_acquisition_funnel
tools.description: Build a Week-1 outreach plan from a completed run's HIGH-intent leads, with per-channel send cadence and per-category action register. Free.

api_key.title: Gorilla API Key
api_key.description: Your API key from gorilla.opusforge.com.br (Menu → API Keys → Create). Starts with grla_.

default_language.title: Default language
default_language.description: Fallback language for refine_idea and draft_outreach when the caller doesn't specify one. Accepts en, pt, or all.

config_url.title: Custom config URL (advanced)
config_url.description: Override the runtime config endpoint. Leave blank for the default. Useful for staging or self-hosted deployments.
